title: eriogonum lanatum
intro: Eriogonum lanatum, also known as the buckwheat sage or wild buckwheat, is a perennial plant native to the western parts of North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Eriogonum lanatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and to treat various health conditions.
